//: Regression-gate thresholds. Copy to your repo root as arena-gate.json (arena gate reads it by default) or pass --config. CLI flags override these.
//accuracyMaxDropPoints: Max allowed resolve-rate drop in points 0-1. 0 = any drop fails.
//accuracyRequireSignificant: Only fail accuracy once the drop clears 95% CI noise (baseline lower bound above the new run's upper bound). Avoids flaking CI on small samples.
//tokensMaxIncreasePct: Fail if median total tokens rose more than this %. null disables.
//costMaxIncreasePct: Fail if median computed cost rose more than this %. null disables.
//speedMaxIncreasePct: Fail if median wall-clock rose more than this %. null = report only (wall clock is environment-dependent).
//allowTaskMismatch: Permit gating a run over a different task set than the baseline. Off by default — comparing resolve rates across different tasks is meaningless.
